summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HyperServe Multi-tenant SaaS Platform. Fixed 3 backend API issues (Address model mismatch, SubscriptionPlan model mismatch, ObjectId serialization) and 1 frontend bug (missing imports in Tenant Admin Dashboard). Backend: 25/25 tests passing. Frontend: Customer E2E flow working, Tenant Admin dashboard working after fix, Super Admin dashboard working.

fixed.issue: Address model expected 'address_line' but seeded data had 'address_line1/address_line2'. Fixed by adding field mapping in route.
SubscriptionPlan model required 'billing_cycle' and 'price' but seeded data had 'pricing_type' and 'monthly_fee'. Fixed by adding field mapping.
ObjectId serialization error in nested delivery_address. Fixed by removing _id from nested objects.

issues: Price breakdown (admin markup, tax, delivery) not displayed - only shows cart total. Backend calculates these during order placement but frontend doesn't show preview.

fixed.issue: ReferenceError: Button is not defined. Missing imports for Button, MenuSquare, Settings from lucide-react and @/components/ui/button

action_items: Consider adding price breakdown preview on Checkout page (show estimated tax, delivery, admin markup before placing order)
Add data-testid attributes to interactive elements for better test automation
Restaurant cards show 'mins' without actual prep time value - check if average_prep_time_minutes is being returned
critical_code_review_comments: Address model in user.py doesn't match seeded data structure - consider updating model or seed script for consistency
SubscriptionPlan model doesn't match seeded data - pricing_type vs billing_cycle, monthly_fee vs price
Checkout.js doesn't show price breakdown (tax, delivery, markup) - user sees only cart total before placing order

success_rate.frontend: 90% (Customer flow working, Tenant Admin working after fix, Super Admin working)

test_credentials.note: OTP is returned in send-otp API response for easy testing

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing seeded data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs working. Customer E2E flow (login -> browse -> add to cart -> checkout -> place order) verified. Tenant Admin Settings page shows delivery charges, tax, and admin markup controls. Super Admin dashboard shows platform analytics. Fixed missing imports in Dashboard.js. Checkout page doesn't show price breakdown preview - this is a design enhancement, not a bug.

rca_of_issues.backend_500_errors: Root cause: Model/data mismatch between Pydantic models and seeded MongoDB data. Address model expected 'address_line' but data had 'address_line1'. SubscriptionPlan expected 'billing_cycle'/'price' but data had 'pricing_type'/'monthly_fee'. Also ObjectId in nested delivery_address wasn't being excluded.
rca_of_issues.tenant_admin_crash: Root cause: Dashboard.js used Button, MenuSquare, Settings components without importing them. Added missing imports from @/components/ui/button and lucide-react.
